name: enrichHtml
label: Enrich from HTML
description: Extract structured product data from raw HTML content. Cost: $0.02/call. Requires both html and url parameters.

parameters.name: html
parameters.label: HTML Content
parameters.help: The raw HTML content of the product page

parameters.name: url
parameters.label: Original Page URL
parameters.help: The original URL of the product page (used for context and relative URL resolution)

parameters.name: strict_confidence_threshold
parameters.label: Confidence Threshold
parameters.help: Fields below this confidence (0.0-1.0) will be scrubbed to null with explanation. Leave empty for all fields.
